item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Sistem hukum kita justru berusaha menjaga keseimbangan antara hak individu dan kepentingan bersama.

notes: Agent A opens clearly pro-society but with a rights caveat, then shifts toward a balance frame while still defending Indonesian collective values. Agent B stays consistently rights-first and constitutionalist, with only bounded acknowledgment that society is not ignored. Agent B turn 2 contains a CJK script artifact inside an English turn: "American価値観".
